title: Taco Bell
html:
Stub. First mentioned in 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 13 am e3d1a9e8.

Mexican-inspired fast-food chain. Yahir scraped the website nutrition pages in three rapid screenshots (4:56:13, 4:56:23, 4:56:30 on 2025-07-18) for BroMenu. Beverage SKU sprawl flagged as a fuzzy-matching challenge. See also 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 23 am 02657aa9 and 2025 07 18 screenshot 2025 07 18 at 4 56 30 am db1a0de7.
